extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Mike won stage 2 of Tour des Alpes Maritimes et du Var with a devastating uphill sprint producing 522W for 2:35 at 62kg, but lost overall GC by 5 seconds to BRAMBILA on final stage.
tactical_patterns: WOODS Mike's 590W peak one-minute power in uphill sprint reveals threshold required to beat Grand Tour contenders at early-season stage races.
Three-rider GROUPAMA-FDJ break strategy on final stage neutralized strongest GC rider's individual superiority, protecting 2-minute advantage despite WOODS' dominance.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: demonstrated superior strength with 522W/2:35 uphill sprint victory but tactical isolation cost overall by 5 seconds to breakaway rider
